title: Ping Display
description: Displays the player's numerical ping in the tablist
body:
**Ping Display** is a simple and useful **Fabric mod** that shows players' **numeric ping** directly in the **tablist**. It helps you quickly understand connection quality and server performance without opening debug screens or using extra commands.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd46d488ad02f7a96a6316035ef04423cfb66d7a.png)

---

## ✨ Features

- 📊 Real-time **numeric ping display** in the tablist
- 🎨 Automatic **color changes based on ping**
- ⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly
- 🧩 Fully compatible with Fabric Loader
- 👀 Perfect for multiplayer servers

---

## 🎨 Ping Color System

The ping value changes color automatically depending on connection quality:

| Ping | Color | Hex (Approx) |
|------|------|--------------|
| ≤ 50 ms | 🟢 Pure Green | `#26FF0A` |
| 100 ms | 🟢 Yellow-Green | `#80FF0A` |
| 150 ms | 🟡 Yellow | `#D9FF0A` |
| 175 ms | 🟠 Orange-Yellow | `#FFE60A` |
| 200 ms | 🟠 Orange | `#FF8C0A` |
| 225 ms | 🔴 Red-Orange | `#FF330A` |
| ≥ 250 ms | 🔴 Pure Red | `#FF0A0A` |

---

## 🚀 Why Use Ping Display?

- Quickly identify laggy players
- Monitor server stability
- Improve multiplayer experience
- Clean and minimal UI integration

---

## 📦 Requirements

- Minecraft (Fabric)
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API (recommended)

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e81436885d7d199d80ffde632b0895d24a2c72b.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)
